world subcultures_ character with this skill can blend in well in the bad" parts of town (Or on bad planets such 2s Dustball and Port Krin}. Successful Streetwise Checks may enable characters correctly interpret veiled messages or other hidden comments in the speech of criminal and underworld figures, identify crimi- nal hierarchies and deal effectively with street-level contacts such as panhandlers arug dealers and prostitutes Streetwise is regional skill, and as such character must choose particular area subskill for his knowledge such as Streetwise /Draconis Combine_
SHOTGUNS This weapon skill used to make attacks with all shotguns and shotgun-like weapons including needler rifles.
STAFFS The Staffs Skill covers the use of all two-handed melee weapons such as the quarterstaff and any of the various pole arms used by martial artists Short one-handed staffs and sticks would use the Blades Skill (p. 977 instead.
SUBMACHINE GUNS This weapon skill is used to make attacks with all burst-fire- capable weapons that can be fired with one hand, including pulse laser pistols_
STEALTH Tne Stealth Skill enables characters move quietly through all types of terrain. When attempting t0 use the skill in the presence of guards or other active observers  an Opposed Test must be made pitting the sneaking character' Stealth Skill against the observer Perception Skill: Stealth can also be used t0 camouflage objects and equip ment. The gamemaster should base difficulty modifiers on the size and shape of the object t0 be concealed and the materials available the character attempting camouflage Camouflage requires several minutes to effect ad may only be performed on stationary equipment: Note that camoutlage nor- mally intended tor specific kind of observation. An APC that has been camouflaged to disguise from aerospace reconnaissance will still be fairly obvious t0 ay infantry the area_ for example.
SUPPORT WEAPONB The Support Weapons Skill confers expertise with support weapons such as rocket launchers_ machine guns and grenade launchers Use of this skill can also identify the types sup port weapons that opposing forces are using based on their sounds and visible effects_
SURGERY The most advanced of the medical skills (the others being First Aid and MedTech), Surgery is used to perform operations to repair serious damage to characters, as well as for installing prosthetic or bionic replacement limbs See Healing (p. 123) for complete rules on the use of this skill:
STRATEGY character with the Strategy Skill is familiar with the for- mulation of battle plans on grand scale. Strategy is similar to the  Tactics   Skill (p_ 107), except that it deals with broader plans: continental assaults  wars waged on multiple worlds or systems and the Iike When planning strategy trying to find weakness in an opponent' s   strategy, the character  must make an Opposed Strategy Test against the character who formulated the plan; Success failure will affect the allocation of   troops and resources_ which_ in turn will affect the outcome of the cam paign Tnis skill also includes familiarity with the different forms of strategy typical of the various forces of the Inner Sphere and the Clans which may provide valuable insights into an oppo nent' plan attack. Note that this skill should not replace planning by the play- er characters If the gamemaster has decided that he wants the setting to be military campaign the characters may use this skill to help formulate their strategy; but they should be respon: sible for coming up with and executing the actual battle plan_
SURVIVAL The Survival Skill enables characters t0 survive unprotect- ed in hostile environments that might otherwise prove Iethal, Characters who are exposed t0 hostile environments for long periods must make weekly   Survival   Skill Checks remain healthy: Modifiers should be based on the severity of the envi: ronment; available survival gear; and the amount of time the char- acter has been exposed tO dangerous conditions (for every suC cessive week add another +1 Modifier). failed roll means the character suffers permanent" Fatigue equal t0 the Margin of Failure. This permanent" Fatigue is only healed when the char acter IS removed from the hostile environment t0 more hos- pitable one or if subsequent weekly Skill Checks are made Each successful weekly check reduces this permanent" Fatigue by
SWIMMING character with the Swimming Skill knows the basics of swimming The skill bonus indicates the character' confidence and expertise For example +0 Skill Bonus indicates knowl: edge basic swimming strokes_ while +3 Skill Bonus or high: indicates advanced abilities that enable the character t0 per- form water rescues or dangerous diving missions Characters attempting difficult or dangerous maneuvers in the water must make Swimming Skill Checks_
